-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://www.americanexpress.com/content/dam/amex/en-us/credit-cards/benefits/resy/resy_mcp_app_claude.pdf)[Privacy Policy](https://resy.com/privacy)[Support](https://resy.com/about-and-help)
    

Resy makes it easy to discover and book restaurant reservations across the United States. Just share what you're looking for, and instantly browse top restaurants, check real-time availability, and secure a table in seconds. Whether it's a last-minute dinner or a special night out, Resy helps you get a seat at the places you love.

You can use Resy to:

**Book a table:**  
"Find a reservation for 2 at a romantic restaurant in the West Village this Saturday around 8pm"

**Discover restaurants:**  
"What are the hottest new restaurants in Austin with availability this week?"

**Plan a group dinner:**  
"Book a table for 8 at a steakhouse in Chicago for next Thursday"
